results.title: Satheesan Govt scraps Silver Line land acquisition, withdraws cases against protesters
results.description: Thiruvananthapuram, May 20 (IANS) In one of the most politically significant decisions taken within days of assuming office, the Cabinet led by Chief Minister, V.D. Satheesan, on Wednesday formally moved to dismantle the controversial Silver Line semi high-speed rail project, announcing the cancellation of all land acquisition notifications issued for the project across Kerala. results.description: A Government contractor will not be pressing ahead with plans to house asylum seekers at former offices overlooking a town's bus station, it has emerged.

results.title: New ‘Mononoke’ Movie Trailer Recaps the Trilogy’s Haunting Buildup
results.description: SummaryTwin Engine dropped a three-minute trailer for the final Mononoke filmThe footage recaps the trilogy while building a haunting mood for the finaleDirected by Kenji Nakamura, the avant-garde film hits Japanese theaters May 29, 2026Twin Engine has unveiled an extensive new three-minute special trailer for Mononoke the Movie: Chapter 3 - The Serpent God, offering a much deeper, more haunting look into the final part of the theatrical trilogy.Following the previous teaser, this latest footage serves as both a recap of the journey so far and a hauntingly atmospheric buildup, setting a profound mood by mirroring the narrative progression established across the last two films. Directed by Kenji Nakamura and produced by Twin Engine, the film pushes the franchise's legendary, avant-garde "Ukiyo-e" paper-texture animation to an unprecedented cinematic scale.Since emerging as a cult-classic spin-off in 2007, Mononoke has achieved massive global popularity for its unique blend of psychological horror, traditional folklore and vibrant, kaleidoscope visuals. With the domestic Japanese theatrical release officially set for May 29, 2026, this final chapter is heavily poised to deliver a definitive, visually unparalleled conclusion to the Medicine Seller's journey before transitioning to international audiences via a global streaming rollout. Read more at Hypebeast

results.title: Leaving your SSD in the front panel ruins its speed and lifespan
results.description: If you own an external SSD, you’re already ahead of the curve when it comes to following the 3-2-1 rule for backups. But while using an external SSD is as easy as just plugging it in and drag-and-dropping some files, you might be hindering its performance by plugging it in at the front. Read More
